title: Human iPSC Culture Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"csuxi","text":"This protocol is intended to establish and maintain human induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs) under sterile conditions, ensuring optimal growth and pluripotency while minimizing contamination risks.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"udxmx","text":"Work under sterile conditions in a biosafety cabinet. Use personal protective equipment (gloves, lab coat, goggles). Dispose of biological waste according to institutional guidelines.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"hwue1","text":"Materials - ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mba7g","text":"Human iPSCs 1 vial","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cdkhk","text":"Matrigel 1 mL per well","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"y7ey6","text":"mTeSR1 medium 2-2.5 mL per well","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wlqrc","text":"Penicillin-Streptomycin 5 mL","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"sbi0y","text":"ReLeSR dissociation reagent 1 mL per well","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hepsp","text":"Phosphate-buffered saline (PBS) 5 mL","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6l3bu","text":"Mycoplasma detection kit 1 kit","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1uhfq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"th4gx","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bje77","text":"Reagents - ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rwxpx","text":"Penicillin-Streptomycin","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"x4ey4","text":"ReLeSR","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xwaod","text":"mTeSR1","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw Matrigel on ice overnight. Dilute Matrigel in cold DMEM/F12 at a ratio of 1:30 (1 mL Matrigel in 30 mL DMEM/F12). Add 1 mL of diluted Matrigel to each well of a 6-well plate. Incubate coated plates at room temperature for 1 hour or at 4 °C overnight.
Grow iPSCs in mTeSR1 medium supplemented with 1% penicillin-streptomycin. Replace medium daily with freshly warmed medium (2-2.5 mL per well). Maintain cells at 37 °C with 5% CO₂.

Aspirate medium from the well. Rinse gently once with 5 mL PBS. Add 1 mL ReLeSR reagent and incubate for 5-7 minutes at room temperature until colonies begin to detach. Gently triturate the colonies to achieve small clumps. Split cells at a 1:12 ratio onto freshly Matrigel-coated dishes containing pre-warmed mTeSR1 medium.
Examine cultures daily under the microscope for compact colonies with smooth edges. Routinely test for mycoplasma contamination.
creator: Hariam Raji
